title: telemetry-otel — HTTP routes
description: No public routes. This module contributes middleware + facades — not endpoints. The health probes surface exists for the health module to hit.

groups.name: platform-otel-internal
groups.description: Debug + operational surface for the SRE team. Not workspace-facing.

routes.description: Live pipeline status: exporter latency, sampled ratio, dropped spans, buffer depth.
Compiled SpanRegistry + MetricRegistry from #[AsSpan] / #[AsCounter] / etc discovery.
Fires a synthetic trace + metric to the configured exporter. Returns exporter round-trip time.
